script_text: Fourth grade grammar dives into pronouns, modals, prepositions, and run-ons.
Pronouns like I, she, he, we replace nouns.
Use them so we do not repeat names too much!
Modals like can, may, must show possibility or permission.
Run-on sentences cram two ideas without punctuation. Fix with a period or comma.
Read aloud. If you run out of breath, it might be a run-on!
Now you are ready for pronouns and grammar rules!
